title: rubus rhombifolius subsp. racemosus
intro: Rubus rhombifolius subsp. racemosus is a subspecies of the rhombifolius raspberry, a type of wild raspberry native to certain regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Rubus rhombifolius subsp. racemosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies.
